channel.title: Is anyone active? I need help with something related to the Excerpt of each post on my blog

item.title: Is anyone active? I need help with something related to the Excerpt of each post on my blog
item.dc:creator: pimschaaf
item.description:
Your question is lacking enough detail to be of much help. To get better help, please review 🌱 Frontity Community Forum Users Guide

In my opinion the content management workflow should be leading in your decision of where to store data (e.g. in posts/blocks/options pages).

Are you using ACF to REST API – WordPress plugin | WordPress.org? This plugin exposes Advanced Custom Fields Endpoints in the WordPress REST API to fetch data from.

Check out other threads, e.g.:

  • How to use Advanced custom field plugin with frontity
  • ACF options page
  • Search results for 'acf' - Frontity Community Forum

Read full topic
item.source: Is anyone active? I need help with something related to the Excerpt of each post on my blog

item.title: Is anyone active? I need help with something related to the Excerpt of each post on my blog
item.dc:creator: santiagobinario
item.description:
Is it right to have all my custom fields on a single page in wordpress? To only then send to call the page to use those fields in different components.

Read full topic

item.title: Is anyone active? I need help with something related to the Excerpt of each post on my blog
item.dc:creator: pimschaaf
item.description:
Hi,

Please elaborate.

it’s very important to provide as much information as you can when describing an issue in a specific project and to provide the resources so the issue can be replicated by anyone .
From 🌱 Frontity Community Forum Users Guide
